summary: Iteration 173: Declaration Section Enrichment - All tests PASS. Backend: GET /api/disputes/{id} returns enriched declaration_summary with target_self_declaration, contradiction_level, summary_phrase, target_name, and is_organizer per declarant. Frontend /decisions/{id}: All new UI elements render correctly - contradiction summary badge, target self-declaration with 'Cible du litige' role badge, declarant role badges (Organisateur), dispute positions section, opened reason banner, and decision link phrase. Tech evidence and financial sections work (no regression). Admin arbitration grouping works (no regression from iteration 172).

backend.test_admin_login_works: PASS - Admin login returns valid token

backend.test_declaration_summary_has_summary_phr: PASS - summary_phrase field with French text
backend.test_declarants_have_is_organizer_field: PASS - Each declarant has is_organizer boolean
backend.test_arbitration_stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct KPIs (escalated=0, awaiting=48, resolved=9)

frontend.contradiction_summary: PASS - data-testid='contradiction-summary' found with ACCORD/DESACCORD badge and summary_phrase
frontend.self_declaration: PASS - data-testid='self-declaration' found with 'Cible du litige' role badge
frontend.declarant_rows: PASS - Declarant rows with 'Organisateur' role badge when applicable

frontend.opened_reason: PASS - data-testid='opened-reason' found with reason banner

frontend.admin_arbitration_loads: PASS - /admin/arbitration page loads with KPI stats
frontend.admin_arbitration_grouping: PASS - Disputes grouped by RDV (regression check from iteration 172)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Declaration section enrichment fully tested and working. Key implementation points: (1) Backend: _get_anonymized_summary at L48-148 in dispute_routes.py returns enriched declaration_summary with target_self_declaration, contradiction_level (enum: unanimous_present/absent, majority_present/absent, disagreement, contradiction_with_proof, no_declarations), summary_phrase (French text), target_name, and is_organizer per declarant. (2) Frontend DecisionDetailPage: DeclarationSection component at L409-511 renders all new UI elements with proper data-testid attributes. (3) Tested disputes: a71b1732... (unanimous_absent, target=Igaal, self_decl=present_late, org_pos=confirmed_absent, part_pos=confirmed_present) and cd36f65d... (unanimous_present, target=Test, self_decl=present_on_time). Note: Login page is at /signin not /login.
